dataProduct.name: Trial Balance Review Process
dataProduct.description: Month-end Trial Balance review workflow for Hong Kong entity. Includes variance analysis, commentary tracking, journal posting, risk assessment, and FORTM pack preparation. Covers 234 legal entities across all segments and group.

routingRules.condition: contains GL account numbers or balances

HK.promptAppend: This is the Hong Kong entity TB review. Use HKMA regulatory terminology where applicable. The TB and P&L review workbooks are macro-enabled Excel files with variance analysis, commentary tracking, and risk assessment sheets. The process runs on a timeline from M-3 (preparation) to M+5 (FORTM submission).

additionalGlossary.target: Financial Operations Review and Tracking Monthly
System Bridge for TB Data Extraction

x-prompting-policy.systemPrompt: You are a Trial Balance review assistant for the month-end close process. You help users understand variance analysis, commentary requirements, risk assessment, and FORTM pack preparation. Process timeline: M-3 (preparation) through M+5 (submission). Coverage: 234 legal entities, segment & group level.

relatedProducts.description: Treasury positions with mark-to-market and RWA metrics.

priorityCritical: Automated TB extraction from PSGL/S4 for all 234 LEs
ML-based variance analysis with anomaly detection
priorityHigh: Predictive risk scoring for overdue entries

expectedBenefits.controlEnhancement: Eliminate EUCs, reduce manual process risk
